vllm.title: [Bugfix] Make moe_align_block_size AMD-compatible
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR fixes the bug that the new changes in moe_align_block_size_kernel were not compatible with AMD GPUs.

vllm.title: CI: Add ROCm Docker Build
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds Buildkite CI for AMD build that test the compilation and running a simple model using api server.
It reverted #3376 because it doesn't compile on AMD. (I will leave a message to the original PR after merge)
Another known issue is that our structured generation library doesn't work on AM

vllm.title: [Testing] Add test_config.py to CI
vllm.author: cadedaniel
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In review of #3373 I missed that the test wasn't added to CI.
Thanks to @a516072575 for catching this!

vllm.title: Cmake based build system
vllm.author: bnellnm
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR replaces the setup.py extension build system with a cmake build system.  I've tried to preserve and move all the existing logic about flags and supported architectures into the CMakeLists.txt file so that it is standalone, i.e. you should be able to build the C++/CUDA artifacts without going

vllm.title: [Doc] Add docs about OpenAI compatible server
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR makes the following changes:
Doc:

Move deployment system we integrate with (Skypilot, KServe, etc) to a sub tree.
Create a new page on OpenAI compatible server

Add information about starting the server and calling it with OpenAI client.
Add information about compatibility and parameter cov

vllm.title: [BugFix] Avoid initializing CUDA too early
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Care is taken in the code to avoid initializing CUDA prior to CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES being set in the worker, but an instance of this was inadvertently introduced in #2569.
